title: DelegationSnapshot
description: docs/canonical/TZ-00-domain-event-canon.md, section 16.2. Owned by delegation-service (epd2_delegation_service.domain.DelegationSnapshot). additionalProperties: false is a load-bearing identity-separation control (mirrors Delegation): account_id, person_id, and identity_record_id are all forbidden and cannot appear on an instance that validates against this schema (epd2_delegation_service.domain.FORBIDDEN_FIELD_NAMES) - `resolved_weights` maps an opaque delegate_actor_id (as a string key) to an integer weight only, never an identity. Immutable once created - frozen by (ballot_id, input_hash), mirroring EligibilitySnapshot's own freeze pattern (canon prohibition #4, 'изменение snapshot после открытия голосования').
